articles.author: Dominic Patten
articles.title: Sam Neill Dead; Jurassic Park Actor Was 78 - Deadline
articles.description: Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill has died suddenly in Australia
articles.content: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor best known for his role in the Jurassic Park franchise, Peaky Blinders and a plethora of independent films has died in Australia, it was announced tonight. The multip… [+3308 chars]
